case_title: OOTEM ADVERTISING, INC. VS. NUVESSE SKIN THERAPIES, INC.
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER OOTEM ADVERTISING, INC. AS TO RESPONDENT NUVESSE SKIN THERAPIES, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT GRANTED IN FAVOR OF PETITIONER OOTEM ADVERTISING, INC. AND AGAINST RESPONDENT NUVESSE SKIN THERAPIES, INC. IN THE AMOUNT OF $665,637.77, WHICH INCLUDES PREJUDGMENT INTEREST IN THE AMOUNT OF $180.24/DAY SINCE THE DATE OF THE AWARD. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FOR PETITION AND CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET (TRANSACTION ID # 100038831) FILED BY PETITIONER OOTEM ADVERTISING, INC.

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED ON EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD(TRANSACTION ID # 100041457) FILED BY PETITIONER OOTEM ADVERTISING, INC.

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON UNOPPOSED PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD; DECLARATION OF BRENDAN MACAULAY IN SUPPORT THEREOF (TRANSACTION ID # 100040821) FILED BY PETITIONER OOTEM ADVERTISING, INC.
ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.
